mappings.control_id: High-risk AI system information must include accuracy metrics and known limitations

mappings.notes: Mandatory AI disclosure prevents users from treating hallucinated content as authoritative human output

mappings.control_id: Audit log service credentials leaked or compromised
mappings.notes: Protect audit log credentials as sensitive NHI

mappings.control_id: Humans using LLM service account credentials — no attribution
mappings.notes: Enforce separate human and machine credentials

mappings.control_name: Review for security vulnerabilities — output validation
mappings.notes: Include accuracy, hallucination, and misinformation scenarios in pre-release model behaviour reviews; validate output quality against domain benchmarks

mappings.control_name: Test for security vulnerabilities — behavioural and accuracy testing
mappings.notes: Conduct adversarial and behavioural testing covering hallucination rates, factual accuracy, and misinformation generation potential before each release

mappings.control_name: Identify and confirm vulnerabilities — emergent behaviour monitoring
mappings.notes: Establish procedures to detect and triage misinformation incidents in production including user feedback channels, automated fact-checking, and output monitoring

mappings.control_name: Design software — output confidence and citation requirements
mappings.notes: Design AI systems to surface confidence indicators, source citations, and uncertainty signals in output; include as explicit security and quality requirements
Monitor model outputs for factual accuracy, consistency, and hallucination indicators; alert when confidence scores or factual grounding drops below thresholds
Include model output quality and drift monitoring in FedRAMP continuous monitoring programme; track accuracy metrics, hallucination rates, and output consistency over time
Regularly review AI inference logs and output samples for hallucination patterns, factual errors, and misleading content; escalate findings through security channels

mappings.control_name: Information Input Validation — grounding and retrieval validation
mappings.notes: Validate retrieval sources and grounding data provided to the model; ensure factual grounding sources are authoritative and current
Deploy detection mechanisms for AI output quality degradation — hallucinations, factual errors, and misleading content in financial AI outputs

mappings.control_name: ICT Risk Management — AI reliability governance
mappings.notes: Include AI output reliability in the ICT risk management framework; define acceptable accuracy thresholds for financial AI use cases
Conduct post-incident analysis for misinformation events; identify root cause, assess customer and regulatory impact, and update controls
Implement factual grounding controls for financial AI outputs — RAG with authoritative sources, confidence scoring, and human review for high-stakes outputs
